# 08_OFFICIAL_ELEMENTOR_CAPABILITY_INDEX

For standard Elementor capability claims, prefer:
1. official Elementor V4+/Atomic documentation
2. official Elementor changelog/release notes
3. installed Elementor Core/Pro version evidence
4. current UI screenshot or user statement
5. diagnostic/frontend/export evidence
6. Builder_Context_Package
7. workbook/reference layer
8. case memory
9. inference

Official docs are the standard source. Current UI evidence is the executable source. Workbook/case files are reference only and cannot prove current UI controls.
